prompt: Build a hero card with title and body in a vertical stack.
openui:
root = Stack([title, rule, hero], "column")
title = TextContent(":smoke.hero.kicker")
rule = Separator()
head = CardHeader(":smoke.hero.title", ":smoke.hero.subtitle")
body = TextContent(":smoke.hero.body")
hero = Card([head, body])

root = Stack([row], "column")
cta = Button(":smoke.cta.label")
row = Buttons([cta])

prompt: Show an informational callout with title and body.
openui:
root = Stack([title, note], "column")
title = TextContent(":smoke.callout.heading")
note = Callout("info", ":smoke.callout.title", ":smoke.callout.body")

prompt: Form with title text, email field, hint, and submit button.
openui:
root = Stack([title, note, form], "column")
title = TextContent(":held.form.title")
email = Input("email", ":held.form.email")
field = FormControl(":held.form.email.label", email)
note = Callout("info", ":held.form.hint.title", ":held.form.hint.body")
submit = Button(":held.form.submit")
actions = Buttons([submit])
form = Form(":held.form.name", actions, [field])

root = Stack([header, rule, row], "column")
header = TextContent(":held.col.header")
rule = Separator()
left_title = TextContent(":held.col.left.title")
left_body = TextContent(":held.col.left.body")
left = Card([left_title, left_body])
right_title = TextContent(":held.col.right.title")
right_body = TextContent(":held.col.right.body")
right = Card([right_title, right_body])
row = Stack([left, right], "row")

prompt: Login stack with email input and continue button.
openui:
root = Stack([email, continueBtn], "column")
email = Input("email", ":held.login.email.placeholder")
continueBtn = Button(":held.login.continue")

prompt: Two-tab panel with overview and details content.
openui:
root = Stack([panel], "column")
overview = TextContent(":held.tabs.overview")
details = TextContent(":held.tabs.details")
tab1 = TabItem(":held.tabs.tab1.value", ":held.tabs.tab1", [overview])
tab2 = TabItem(":held.tabs.tab2.value", ":held.tabs.tab2", [details])
panel = Tabs([tab1, tab2])

prompt: Settings list with a switch and a slider.
openui:
root = Stack([notify, volume], "column")
notify = SwitchItem(":held.settings.notify", ":held.settings.notify.desc", ":held.settings.notify.name")
volume = Slider(":held.settings.volume.name", "continuous", 0, 100, 1, [40], ":held.settings.volume")

prompt: Nest two cards in a column stack with title and body text each.
openui:
root = Stack([a, rule, b], "column")
rule = Separator()
a_title = TextContent(":adv.rare.a.title")
a_body = TextContent(":adv.rare.a.body")
a = Card([a_title, a_body])
b_title = TextContent(":adv.rare.b.title")
b_body = TextContent(":adv.rare.b.body")
b = Card([b_title, b_body])

prompt: Nest a card inside another card inside a column stack.
openui:
root = Stack([outer], "column")
inner_title = TextContent(":adv.nest.inner.title")
inner_body = TextContent(":adv.nest.inner.body")
inner = Card([inner_title, inner_body])
inner_wrap = Stack([inner], "column")
outer_title = TextContent(":adv.nest.outer.title")
outer = Card([outer_title, inner_wrap])

prompt: Row of three equally important action buttons.
openui:
root = Stack([a, b, c], "row")
a = Button(":adv.btns.a")
b = Button(":adv.btns.b")
c = Button(":adv.btns.c")

prompt: Dashboard-like layout with header text and two metric cards.
openui:
root = Stack([header, rule, row], "column")
header = TextContent(":ood.dash.header")
rule = Separator()
m1_title = TextContent(":ood.dash.m1.title")
m1_body = TextContent(":ood.dash.m1.body")
m1 = Card([m1_title, m1_body])
m2_title = TextContent(":ood.dash.m2.title")
m2_body = TextContent(":ood.dash.m2.body")
m2 = Card([m2_title, m2_body])
row = Stack([m1, m2], "row")

prompt: Image block with caption text, a supporting note, and a CTA underneath.
openui:
root = Stack([shot, caption, note, cta], "column")
shot = ImageBlock(":ood.gallery.img", ":ood.gallery.alt")
caption = TextContent(":ood.gallery.caption")
note = Callout("info", ":ood.gallery.hint.title", ":ood.gallery.hint.body")
cta = Button(":ood.gallery.cta")

prompt: Modal dialog confirming a destructive delete action.
openui:
root = Stack([dialog], "column")
body = TextContent(":ood.modal.body")
confirm = Button(":ood.modal.confirm")
actions = Buttons([confirm])
dialog = Modal(":ood.modal.title", true, [body, actions])

prompt: Sign-up column with name input, email input, and create button.
openui:
root = Stack([name, email, create], "column")
name = Input("text", ":ood.auth.name")
email = Input("email", ":ood.auth.email")
create = Button(":ood.auth.create")
